description: Create a global polygon grid and calculate city density using gvSIG Desktop. Using the Populated Places layer from '/home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp', generate a global vector grid covering the world extent (-180, -90, 180, 90) with a cell size of 20x20 degrees. The final output must be a shapefile saved to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/city_density_grid.shp' containing rectangular polygon grid cells and an attribute field representing the count of cities within each cell.
